title: Vacant land and subdividing
description: Find out the tax treatment and if you can claim deductions for holding, selling or subdividing vacant land.
keywords: property, land, vacant land, subdivide land, development, selling vacant land capital gains tax, CGT vacant land, property tax

child_links.title: Deductions for vacant land
child_links.description: Work out if you can claim a deduction for the costs incurred in holding vacant land on or after 1 July 2019.

child_links.title: Vacant land before 1 July 2019
child_links.description: Work out if you can claim deductions for vacant land before 1 July 2019, also if CGT and GST apply.

child_links.title: Subdividing land
child_links.description: If you subdivide a block of land, there may be tax implications such as capital gains tax (CGT) or GST.

child_links.title: Victorian windfall gains tax
child_links.description: If the Victorian windfall gains tax isn't deductible, it may be included in the cost base of your land for CGT purposes.
